mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_file_chunk_info ( id, upload_id, chunk_index, chunk_md5, object_key, chunk_size, status, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.uploadId}, #{item.chunkIndex}, #{item.chunkMd5}, #{item.objectKey}, #{item.chunkSize}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT chunk_index FROM sys_file_chunk_info WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_file_chunk_info WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_file_chunk_info WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = 0
